title: Numeric Class
description: Represents a spin box that displays numeric value.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create Numeric control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly elementPrefix: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the prefix element.

properties.name: readonly elementSuffix: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the suffix element.

properties.name: readonly elementInput: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the input element.

properties.name: readonly elementUp: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the button‑up element.

properties.name: readonly elementDown: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the button‑down element.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: value?: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the value of Numeric.

properties.name: min?: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the minimum allowed value; the default is null.

properties.name: max?: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the maxium allowed value; the default is null.

properties.name: prefix: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the prefix character. Default: <mark>""</mark> (empty string).

properties.name: suffix: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the suffix character. Default: <mark>""</mark> (empty string).

properties.name: step: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the value to increment or decrement the spin box (also known as an up-down control) when the up or down buttons are clicked; the default is <mark>1</mark>.

properties.name: stepViaWheel: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the control can accept step changes via the mouse wheel; the default is <mark>false</mark>.

properties.name: minimumFractionDigits: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the minimum number of digits to appear after the decimal point; the default is <mark>0</mark>.

properties.name: maximumFractionDigits: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the maximum number of digits to appear after the decimal point; the default is <mark>2</mark>.

properties.name: decimalSeparator: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the decimal separator character; the default value is the locale’s decimal separator.

properties.name: thousandSeparator: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the thousand separator character; the default value is the locale’s thousand separator.

properties.name: nullable: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the value can be null; the default is <mark>true</mark>.

properties.name: readonly: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the control is not mutable, meaning the user can not edit the control; the default is <mark>false</mark>.

properties.name: controls: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the increment and decrement buttons are visible; the default is <mark>false</mark>.

events.name: numericchange
events.description: The change event is fired when the user modifies and commits the value.

static_methods.name: parseFloat(text: string, option: NumericFormatOption): number
static_methods.description: Parses an argument, converting it to a string if necessary, and returns a floating-point number.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The value to parse. If it is not a string, it is converted to one using the ToString abstract operation.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: An object that supplies culture-specific formatting information.

returns.description: Returns a floating-point number parsed from the given string using the specified language-sensitive representation.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: An object that supplies culture-specific formatting information.

returns.description: Returns a language-sensitive string representation of the given floating-point number.
